import React from "react"; import CommonFormModal from "../../../components/CommonFormModel"; function ChangePasswordModal({ selectedUser, newPassword, confirmPassword, setNewPassword, setConfirmPassword, onSave, }) { return (
Password Policy
  1. Minimum 8 characters.
  2. At least one uppercase letter.
  3. At least one lowercase letter.
  4. At least one numeric digit.
  5. At least one special character.
  6. No spaces allowed.
setNewPassword(e.target.value) } />
setConfirmPassword(e.target.value) } />
); } export default ChangePasswordModal;
